questions.question: Does `npm run build` complete without TypeScript errors or compilation failures?
questions.actionable_check: Run `npm run build` in school-app directory and verify exit code 0
evidence_required: build output showing all pages compiled
questions.pass_criteria: Build succeeds with all routes compiled as static pages

questions.question: Do all 6 required routes exist and render a page heading?
questions.actionable_check: Navigate to /, /topics, /topic/[slug], /leaderboard, /study-times, /settings and verify heading visible
evidence_required: screenshots or DOM output for each route
questions.pass_criteria: All 6 routes render without errors and show meaningful page headings

questions.question: Is the shared navigation component present on all pages?
questions.actionable_check: Visit each route, verify nav with links to Topics, Leaderboard, Study Times, Settings is visible
questions.pass_criteria: Navigation is consistently present and accessible on all pages

questions.question: Are all TypeScript types from spec section 4.3 defined in src/types/index.ts?
questions.actionable_check: Read src/types/index.ts and verify Topic, QuizQuestion, StudyPlan, StudyStep, StudyTask, Settings, Progress, StudyTimes types exist
evidence_required: file contents showing all required types
questions.pass_criteria: All spec-required types are present and correctly typed

questions.question: Is Chakra UI v2 correctly integrated with the app?
questions.actionable_check: Verify ChakraProvider wraps the app in _app.tsx, custom theme with brand colors is applied
questions.pass_criteria: Chakra UI v2 is installed and configured with custom theme

mandatory_questions.question: Do all Playwright E2E tests in story-01-scaffold.spec.ts pass?
evidence_required: playwright test output showing N passed
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All 6 E2E tests pass: home page, navigation, topics, leaderboard, study-times, settings

mandatory_questions.question: Is the app configured for static export (output: 'export' in next.config.mjs)?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Read next.config.mjs and verify output: 'export' setting
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: Static export is configured for CDN/static hosting
